title: Produce both registers for one finding
guidance: Reward two genuinely different registers carrying the same content.

runner_input.instruction: Write the finding as a prose memo line AND as a telegraphic slide line.
runner_input.constraints: Two versions. The slide version must be visibly shorter and clipped, not just reworded.

source_blocks.text: Finding: The engineering team has shipped a working AI feature, but the organisation chart does not name any dedicated machine-learning or data engineer, so the depth of in-house AI capability is unclear and needs to be confirmed in technical due diligence.

rubric_notes: Prose: a full sentence as given. Slide: e.g. 'AI shipped; no named ML/data eng in org chart — depth TBC in TDD.'
The slide version should drop articles and connectives, not just swap words.
